title: A Buncha Incomplete YTPMVs by Yours Truly
description:
This is like some sort of a history slate, showing how my skills were before my recently good videos of sort.

Indefinetely I won't finish these incomplete YTPMVs no matter what you guise say. Sorry if you actually did want one to be completed, but we all gotta live with my fickleness.

I am, however, thinking of doing an Encirclement Battle YTPMV later on, but with a different source.
